purpose: Golden structured reports for regression testing benchmark_cases.py. Each good_report should pass benchmark grading and report audit; each bad_report should fail benchmark grading.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENTJ-like Te-Ni, with INTJ as the live runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Idle external optimization and command energy favor ENTJ.

claims.claim: External optimization appears default rather than role-only.

evidence.observation: Free mornings go to people, leverage, and execution order.
Directing high-stakes teams makes cognition feel alive.
Facts externalize first; shame appears later.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Repeated command energy and idle external leverage.

cross_framework_check.big_five: Likely high conscientiousness and assertive dominance.
cross_framework_check.other: A/T not needed unless rumination is explored.

falsifiers: private model dominates idle time across repeated low-role contexts
framework_boundaries: Function stack language is interpretive, not measured.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INTJ-like Ni-Te, with ENTJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: The user can lead and execute.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Leadership drains; private model priority is stronger.

claims.caveat: Competence at leading may obscure introverted default.

evidence.observation: Best thinking happens after people leave.
Leadership is possible but draining.
Model must be clean before execution.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High conscientiousness may mimic J/Te across both candidates.
cross_framework_check.other: Role performance must be separated from energy source.

good_report.uncertainty: Need stress data to refine inferior pattern.
falsifiers: live command repeatedly energizes cognition across low-burnout contexts

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INFP-like Fi-Ne, with INFJ and ISFP as runner-ups.

runner_up.steelman: Depth and sensitivity can look Ni-Fe.

claims.claim: Inner congruence is the first decision axis.
claims.caveat: Conflict examples should be checked across contexts.

evidence.observation: First asks whether the action can be personally endorsed.
Explores many meanings around identity fit.
Can break harmony when inner truth is violated.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Possibility and meaning exploration are prominent.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness may support possibility exploration.
cross_framework_check.other: Sensitivity alone is not a type conclusion.

good_report.uncertainty: Need embodied action vs abstract meaning evidence for ISFP exclusion.
falsifiers: relational pattern convergence outranks inner congruence in repeated conflicts
framework_boundaries: Fi-Ne is an interpretive process label.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INFJ-like Ni-Fe, with INFP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Values and emotional depth remain visible.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Relational pattern is read before personal congruence.

claims.claim: The mind converges on relational trajectory.

evidence.observation: Notices where relationships are heading before admission.
Converges on one interpretation for the group.
Reads relational pattern before values.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Private convergence appears prior to outward alignment.

cross_framework_check.other: Fe evidence is not clinical empathy.

good_report.uncertainty: E/I energy needs more evidence if ENFJ remains live.
falsifiers: personal value congruence overrides relational pattern under low social pressure
framework_boundaries: MBTI is used as a structured interview language.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESTJ-like Te-Si, with ENTJ as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Trust in proven procedures and best practices favors Si.

claims.claim: Operational continuity is the trust source.

evidence.observation: Trusts procedures that have proven reliable.
Imposes standards, roles, deadlines, and accountability.
Improves through known best practices before radical redesign.

alternatives.hardest_problem: Future architecture is not the primary trust source.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High conscientiousness is likely but not type-specific.
cross_framework_check.other: Role and industry norms may inflate Te.

good_report.uncertainty: Need response to obsolete but functional systems.
falsifiers: future architecture overrides precedent in repeated strategic decisions
framework_boundaries: Te-Si is an interpretive process label, not a measured score.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENTP-like Ne-Ti, with ENFP as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Model play outranks personal meaning in the described moment.

claims.claim: Debate is used to sharpen impersonal models.
claims.caveat: Need values-conflict examples to fully exclude ENFP.

evidence.observation: Debate sharpens the model.
Will attack favorite idea if logic is weak.
Personal meaning is secondary in the moment.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness likely; extraversion depends on debate energy vs social warmth.
cross_framework_check.other: Values secondary does not mean values absent.

falsifiers: personal meaning outranks model play when stakes are real
framework_boundaries: This is not a standardized questionnaire score.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ISFJ-like Si-Fe, with INFJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Private care and people awareness can look Ni-Fe.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Known obligations and remembered support are central.

claims.claim: Care is organized through memory and reliable routines.
claims.caveat: Need future-pattern examples to fully test INFJ.

evidence.observation: Remembers what people need and what helped before.
Care is delivered through reliable routines and support.
Future patterns matter less than not failing people now.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes private memory more than outward social orchestration.

cross_framework_check.other: Caregiving role can mimic Fe strength.

good_report.uncertainty: Need energy data for ISFJ vs ESFJ.
falsifiers: future pattern interpretation overrides known obligations over repeated cases
framework_boundaries: Si-Fe is used as a qualitative hypothesis.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESTP-like Se-Ti, with ENTP as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: Live tactical reality outranks abstract possibility.

claims.claim: Improvisation is anchored in live pressure and concrete action.
claims.caveat: Need low-stimulation ideation data to fully exclude ENTP.

evidence.observation: Best improvisation happens in live pressure.
Real room and body language matter more than abstraction.
Enjoys winning the situation, not just the argument.

alternatives.best_case: Se and social presence are strong.
alternatives.hardest_problem: Tactical read and winning the situation are more Ti/Se than Fi/Se expression.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High extraversion/stimulation seeking may be present.
cross_framework_check.other: Provocation alone is not ENTP evidence.

good_report.uncertainty: Need values-expression vs tactical-control data for ESFP.
falsifiers: abstract conceptual play outranks live tactical action when no audience is present
framework_boundaries: This is interview evidence, not psychometric measurement.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENFJ-like Fe-Ni, with ESFJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Warmth and caretaking can look Fe-Si.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Group direction and people-development future are more central than comfort maintenance.

claims.claim: The user's social energy is organized around future group development.
claims.caveat: A community role could amplify outward guidance.

evidence.observation: Reads what a group could become and steers people toward that future.
Warmth and feedback are organized around growth.
Comfort and tradition are secondary to shared direction.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The described stance is openly steering the group rather than privately converging first.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High agreeableness and social confidence could be present.
cross_framework_check.other: Social skill is not enough to separate Fe-Ni from Fe-Si.

good_report.uncertainty: Need low-role evidence for whether future guidance remains the default.
falsifiers: known social duty outranks future people-development across repeated group choices
framework_boundaries: Fe-Ni is a qualitative hypothesis, not a measured score.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESFJ-like Fe-Si, with ENFJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Encouragement and people leadership are visible.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Relationship continuity and known obligations are the trust source.

claims.claim: Care is anchored in social continuity and remembered obligations.
claims.caveat: Family or team context may increase obligation language.

evidence.observation: Tracks birthdays, obligations, expectations, and group functioning.
Trusts what has kept relationships stable before.
Future growth is less urgent than preventing present social failure.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes outward group tracking more than private support memory.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High agreeableness and conscientiousness may explain some stability focus.
cross_framework_check.other: Fe-Si should be tested outside family or duty-heavy settings.

good_report.uncertainty: Need examples where tradition conflicts with future group development.
falsifiers: future people-development overrides known social obligations when both are available
framework_boundaries: This is structured interview reasoning, not a standardized instrument.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ISTP-like Ti-Se, with INTP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Detached analysis and systems language are present.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Trust is earned through mechanism testing and real tool contact.

claims.claim: The analytic process is validated by live mechanism testing.
claims.caveat: Technical work can pull many types toward tool language.

evidence.observation: Understands systems by taking them apart and testing the mechanism.
Real object failure determines trust.
Theory is useful when it improves the fix.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt foregrounds detached mechanism logic more than social/live tactical dominance.

cross_framework_check.big_five: Low verbal expressiveness would not by itself prove ISTP.
cross_framework_check.other: Technical competence is a role confound.

good_report.uncertainty: Need evidence about private theorizing when no tool is present.
falsifiers: abstract model exploration outranks tool contact in repeated low-pressure contexts
framework_boundaries: Ti-Se is an interpretive process label.

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is INTP-like Ti-Ne, with ISTP as runner-up.

runner_up.why_it_loses: The fascination begins in conceptual refinement before tool contact.

claims.claim: The default reward is a clean internal model and edge-case exploration.
claims.caveat: Academic setting could inflate conceptual language.

evidence.observation: Keeps refining the internal model without immediate external need.
Enjoys alternate definitions and edge cases.
Physical tinkering is not where fascination starts.

alternatives.best_case: Ne and debate may be visible.
alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes private model purity more than live exchange energy.

cross_framework_check.other: Technical skill should not be confused with S/N by itself.

good_report.uncertainty: Need live debate vs private modeling energy data for ENTP.
falsifiers: tool contact and live mechanism testing outrank conceptual exploration when both are available

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ISFP-like Fi-Se, with INFP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Private values and sensitivity are strong.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Value recognition is immediate, embodied, and aesthetic before possibility exploration.

claims.claim: The value signal appears through embodied response rather than abstract meanings first.
claims.caveat: Artistic context can make Se language more visible.

evidence.observation: Knows what feels true while making, moving, choosing colors, or responding to the scene.
Taste and immediate aesthetic response are decisive.
Many possible meanings are not needed before the value line appears.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt centers private value alignment more than outward room energy.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness may appear through aesthetics.
cross_framework_check.other: Private values are not enough to choose INFP over ISFP.

good_report.uncertainty: Need evidence about group energy and public performance to test ESFP.
falsifiers: abstract possibility exploration outranks embodied aesthetic response under low-performance conditions

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ESFP-like Se-Fi, with ESTP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Bold improvisation and tactical action are visible.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Live authenticity and emotional impact constrain the tactic.

claims.claim: The live-room energy is filtered through a personal value and authenticity signal.
claims.caveat: Performance contexts can make Se look stronger than it is.

evidence.observation: Comes alive in the room and tracks emotional movement.
The moment has to feel real to the user.
Tactical wins feel empty when they kill the vibe or betray values.

alternatives.best_case: Value and possibility may be visible.
alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt anchors energy in the immediate room rather than abstract futures.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High extraversion and openness may both be present.
cross_framework_check.other: Boldness alone cannot separate ESFP from ESTP.

good_report.uncertainty: Need examples when emotional authenticity conflicts with immediate stimulation.
falsifiers: impersonal tactical leverage outranks live authenticity when stakes rise

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ISTJ-like Si-Te, with INTJ as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Reserve and long-range seriousness can look Ni-Te.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Record accuracy and proven procedure are checked before strategic abstraction.

claims.claim: The trust anchor is verified precedent and procedural accuracy.
claims.caveat: Compliance-heavy environments can amplify record language.

evidence.observation: Trusts what happened, what was promised, and what worked.
Checks details that break the process.
Strategy comes after facts, timeline, and procedure accuracy.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes record accuracy before external command.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High conscientiousness may mimic both ISTJ and INTJ.
cross_framework_check.other: Reserved seriousness is not sufficient Ni evidence.

good_report.uncertainty: Need examples where precedent conflicts with an elegant future model.
falsifiers: future strategic abstraction outranks record accuracy in repeated decisions

good_report.short_answer: Best-supported formulation is ENFP-like Ne-Fi, with ENTP as runner-up.

runner_up.steelman: Speed, novelty, and verbal play overlap.
runner_up.why_it_loses: Possibility stays connected to identity and human value.

claims.claim: Exploration is motivated by personal meaning rather than impersonal model play first.
claims.caveat: Social context may amplify warmth and values language.

evidence.observation: Chases possibilities because one might unlock becoming or what matters.
Ideas must stay connected to human value.
Debate loses appeal when it strips meaning out of people.

alternatives.hardest_problem: The prompt emphasizes outward novelty chasing and possibility momentum.

cross_framework_check.big_five: High openness and social energy may both be visible.
cross_framework_check.other: Novelty seeking alone does not prove Ne-Fi.

good_report.uncertainty: Need evidence under low social approval pressure.
falsifiers: impersonal model play outranks personal meaning when the argument gets serious
framework_boundaries: Ne-Fi is a working interpretation, not a measured score.
